basic_details.job_title: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician C Posts
basic_details.short_information: Bharat Electronics (BEL) has published the Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician 'C' Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 7 Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician 'C' positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 28 years (with applicable relaxations) and holding a Diploma in Engineering for Engineering Assistant Trainee or SSLC + ITI + Apprenticeship for Technician 'C' are eligible to apply online at the official BEL website. The application process will remain open up to 02 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notificatio

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 28 Years Age Relaxation: OBC(NCL): 3 years SC/ST: 5 years PwBD: 10 years PwBD (additional): 10 years (in addition to SC/ST/OBC(NCL) relaxation)

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Engineering for EAT, SSLC+ITI+Apprenticeship for Technician 'C'
qualification.details: Engineering Assistant Trainee*: Three years Diploma in Engineering in the relevant discipline / subject from a recognized institution. Minimum 60% aggregate marks (50% for PwBD candidates). Experience: Nil Technician 'C': SSLC+ITI in the relevant trade from a recognized institution and one year apprenticeship training with National Apprenticeship Certificate in the relevant trade or SSLC + 3 years National Apprenticeship Certificate Course in the relevant Trade. Minimum 60% aggregate marks (50% for PwBD candidates). Experience: Nil

salary_details.details: Engineering Assistant Trainees (EAT) will undergo training for an initial period of six months during which they will be paid stipend of Rs. 24,000/- per month. On successful completion of the training and on passing the gradation test they will be placed in the regular pay scales. EAT: Rs. 24,500-3%-90,000/- + admissible allowances Technician 'C': Rs. 21500-3%-82000+ admissible allowances In addition to Basic Pay, other allowance like Dearness Allowance, House Rent Allowance, Perquisites at the rate of 30% on annual basic pay, reimbursement of medical expenses, Group Insurance, PF, Pension, Gratuity etc. as per Company rules will be a part of remuneration package.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BEL Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician 'C' posts is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician 'C' posts in Bharat Electronics.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Engineering Assistant Trainee?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for Engineering Assistant Trainee is a 3-year Diploma in Engineering from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the BEL recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit is between 18 to 28 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for BEL recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 590/- for GEN/OBC(NCL)/EWS candidates. SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-servicemen are exempted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the starting salary for Technician 'C' post?
faq.answer: The starting salary for Technician 'C' is Rs. 21500-3%-82000/- plus admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any experience required for these posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no prior experience required for both Engineering Assistant Trainee and Technician 'C' posts.

faq.question: Q9. Can a candidate apply for both posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates can apply separately for each post if they meet the eligibility criteria for both.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BEL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
